extra.parity_note: sp.did_imputation fits the untreated-only TWFE first stage on the unbalanced untreated panel and matches didimputation::did_imputation's simple ATT on the mpdta replica.
extra.stata_never_treated_coding: Stata did_imputation expects missing Ei for never-treated units; the Stata parity script recodes first_treat==0 before estimation.
extra.se_reference: SE rows are side-specific: StatsPAI reports se_cluster_if, R reports se_didimputation, and Stata reports se_stata_did_imputation.
